full_text:
Fei Shi (Gongju) 費詩 (公舉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei Shi (費詩), styledGongju (公舉), was born in Jianwei, Nan An. Gave refuge to Liu Zhang’s officers. Protested against Liu Bei becoming Emperor. Fei Shi was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Fei Shi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
